mission.title: opentelemetry-collector: [Proposal] Add an additional APAC collector/agent SIG
mission.description: [Proposal] Add an additional APAC collector/agent SIG. Requested by 7+ users.

steps.title: Check current opentelemetry-collector deployment
steps.description:
Verify your opentelemetry-collector version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector
helm list -n opentelemetry-collector 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working opentelemetry-collector installation.

steps.title: Review opentelemetry-collector configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-collector configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector
kubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-collector
```
Apologies if I have opened this in the wrong spot, please feel free move it into the correct place.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Proposal] Add an additional APAC collector/agent SIG
steps.description:
Here is one table with proposed and existing **starting** meeting times at some relevant timezones (US West Coast, US East Coast, CET which covers most of Europe, China, and Sidney):

|         | UTC−08:00 (PST) | UTC -05:00 (EST) | UTC +01:00 (CET) | UTC +08:00 (China) | UTC +10:00 (Sidney) |
|---------|-----------------|------------------|------------------|--------------------|---------------------|
| NA-EU   | **09:00**           | **12:00**            | **18:00**            | *01:00*      

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector
kubectl get events -n opentelemetry-collector --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[Proposal] Add an additional APAC collector/agent SIG" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Here is one table with proposed and existing **starting** meeting times at some relevant timezones (US West Coast, US East Coast, CET which covers most of Europe, China, and Sidney):

|         | UTC−08:00 (PST) | UTC -05:00 (EST) | UTC +01:00 (CET) | UTC +08:00 (China) | UTC +10:00 (Sidney)

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry-collector installed or the issue environment reproducible.
